tree.name: Vince Williams Jr.
tree.tradeDescription: UTA traded Kyle Anderson, Walter Clayton Jr., Taylor Hendricks, Georges Niang, 2027 1st (more favorable conditional), 2027 1st (LAL own), 2031 1st (PHO own) to MEM for Jaren Jackson Jr., John Konchar, Jock Landale, Vince Williams Jr. Memphis also received a trade exception.
tree.note: VCU guard, 6'6" defensive specialist, athletic wing

assetsGivenUp.name: Walter Clayton Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Draft-night trade: Jazz sent Will Riley (#21), Jamir Watkins (#43), 2031 2nd (more favorable), 2032 2nd (UTA own) to Washington for Walter Clayton Jr. (#18).
assetsGivenUp.note: Florida guard, drafted 18th overall 2025

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Anderson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: UTA traded John Collins to LAC; LAC traded Norman Powell to MIA; MIA traded Kyle Anderson and Kevin Love to UTA; LAC traded cash and 2027 2nd (LAC own) to UTA.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward, acquired from Miami in 3-team deal

assetsGivenUp.name: John Collins
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded Rudy Gay and 2026 2nd (MEM own) to Atlanta for John Collins.
assetsGivenUp.note: Wake Forest forward, acquired from Hawks

assetsGivenUp.name: Rudy Gay
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward, signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via MEM
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded Santi Aldama to MEM for Jared Butler, 2022 2nd (MEM own), 2026 2nd (MEM own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis's own 2026 2nd round pick, acquired in Aldama trade, sent to Atlanta for Collins

assetsGivenUp.name: Taylor Hendricks
assetsGivenUp.note: UCF forward, Jazz drafted 9th overall 2023

assetsGivenUp.name: Georges Niang
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded RJ Luis to Boston for Georges Niang, 2027 2nd (more favorable), and 2031 2nd (more favorable). Boston received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Iowa State forward, veteran role player

assetsGivenUp.name: RJ Luis
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed to two-way contract

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick (more favorable conditional)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: From Rudy Gobert trade: UTA received Kessler, Beasley, Beverley, Bolmaro, Vanderbilt, 2023 1st, 2025 1st, 2026 1st swap, 2027 1st, 2029 1st from MIN for Gobert.
assetsGivenUp.note: Conditional 2027 1st from Gobert trade haul

assetsGivenUp.name: Rudy Gobert
assetsGivenUp.note: 3x DPOY, French center, Jazz drafted 27th overall 2013

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick via LAL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: UTA traded Conley, NAW, 2025 2nd (UTA), 2026 2nd (UTA) to MIN; Beasley, Vanderbilt to LAL; LAL traded Damian Jones, Toscano-Anderson, Westbrook, 2027 1st (LAL own) to UTA; LAL traded 2024 2nd to MIN; MIN traded D'Angelo Russell to LAL.
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' own 2027 first-round pick, acquired in Conley mega-trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Mike Conley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded Grayson Allen, Jae Crowder, Kyle Korver, Darius Bazley, and 2022 1st (became Walker Kessler #22, conditional top-6 protected) to MEM for Mike Conley.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran PG, acquired from Memphis in blockbuster trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Grayson Allen
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke guard, UTA 2018 1st round pick. Sent to MEM for Conley.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jae Crowder
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: UTA traded Rodney Hood to CLE and Joe Johnson to SAC; CLE traded Jae Crowder, Derrick Rose, and 2024 2nd swap to UTA; CLE traded Iman Shumpert, cash, Agravanis, 2020 2nd to SAC; SAC traded George Hill to CLE.
assetsGivenUp.note: Versatile wing, acquired from Cleveland in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Rodney Hood
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke wing, UTA 2014 1st round pick. Sent to CLE for Crowder.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Korver
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded Alec Burks, 2020 2nd (became Justinian Jessup), and 2021 2nd (WAS own, became Greg Brown III) to CLE for Kyle Korver.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran sharpshooter, acquired from Cleveland

assetsGivenUp.name: Alec Burks
assetsGivenUp.note: Colorado guard, UTA 2011 1st round pick. Sent to CLE for Korver.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: UTA own 2020 2nd, sent to CLE for Korver

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick via WAS
assetsGivenUp.note: Washington's 2021 2nd, sent to CLE for Korver

assetsGivenUp.name: Darius Bazley
assetsGivenUp.note: UTA 2019 1st round pick (#23). Sent to MEM for Conley.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick (#22)
assetsGivenUp.note: UTA own 2022 1st, sent to MEM for Conley. Conditional, protected in 2020/2021, conveyed 2022 as #22.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick via PHO
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA traded 2025 1st (least favorable CLE/MIN, became CLE pick), 2027 1st (least favorable CLE/UTA/MIN), 2029 1st (least favorable CLE/UTA/MIN top-5 protected) to Phoenix for 2031 1st (PHO own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Phoenix's own 2031 first-round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: From Donovan Mitchell trade: UTA traded Mitchell to CLE for Markkanen, Sexton, Agbaji, 2025 1st (CLE), 2026 1st swap, 2027 1st (CLE), 2028 1st swap, 2029 1st (CLE).
assetsGivenUp.note: Cleveland's own 2025 1st, conveyed as least favorable of CLE/MIN picks
